summary.intent: Perform a codebase-wide audit of hardcoded color values and replace them with mode-aware Mantine color tokens or light-dark() wrappers to ensure proper dark/light mode support.
summary.outcome: All identified hardcoded hex colors and non-mode-aware Mantine tokens were replaced across 6 component/screen files, making the UI properly theme-aware for both light and dark modes.

repo: Project uses Mantine UI with light-dark() for theme-aware colors; raw hex values and plain Mantine tokens break dark mode
Status dot colors (#22c55e active, #f59e0b pending, #d1d5db inactive) were duplicated in both SessionRow.tsx and SessionTree.tsx
var(--mantine-color-gray-1) border in SessionTree.tsx was invisible in dark mode — needs light-dark(gray-2, dark-5)
Near-white teal #f8fffe should map to var(--mantine-color-teal-0)
#fff inside light-dark() should use var(--mantine-color-white) instead

code.finding: Status dot colors #22c55e, #f59e0b, #d1d5db replaced with Mantine tokens; #d1d5db wrapped in light-dark()
Duplicate status dot colors same as SessionRow; replaced identically
var(--mantine-color-gray-1) border invisible in dark mode; replaced with light-dark(gray-2, dark-5)
NOTIF_META inline colors #b45309, #6b7280 too dark for dark mode; replaced with light-dark(orange-8/gray-7, orange-4/gray-4)
EVENT_COLOR map with #06b6d4, #94a3b8, #f59e0b replaced with Mantine tokens + light-dark() for gray
#94a3b8, #64748b icon/label colors replaced with light-dark(gray-6, gray-4) via shared constant
Standalone #64748b (not in light-dark()) replaced with light-dark(gray-6, gray-4)

workflow: Grepping for both hex patterns (#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}) and string color values (color: 'white') in parallel surfaces different categories of issues
Reading affected files before editing is necessary to understand context and avoid incorrect replacements

friction: Hit usage/rate limit mid-session ('You've hit your limit · resets 6pm America/New_York'), requiring the user to resume the session manually
Multiple sequential edits were needed on EventItem.tsx (3 separate Edit calls) suggesting the file required careful incremental changes
open_items: app/src/renderer/src/api.ts and src/server.ts appear in the modified files list but were not discussed in the transcript — changes there are unreviewed/unexplained
No automated test or visual regression was run to verify dark/light mode rendering after the changes
A follow-up grep pass could confirm no remaining hardcoded colors were missed
